Document:
# Energy Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Energy_Weapons"]
Energy weapons use focused laser technology to deliver precise, armor-punching hits. They do not use conventional ammunition, relying instead on power cells and other specialized energy feeds.
These weapons are rare and expensive, and are most often seen in the hands of the Brotherhood of Steel, the Enclave, and elite scavengers.
## Laser Pistols
Compact laser sidearms useful for self-defense, patrol work, and precision shooting.
[bold]Laser Pistol[/bold] — Standard energy sidearm. Reliable and easy to maintain with charged cells.
[bold]Laser Revolver[/bold] — Revolving-chamber laser pistol. Slower to reload but packs more punch per shot.
[bold]Recharger Pistol[/bold] — Self-charging energy pistol. Never runs out of ammo but fires slowly.
## Laser Rifles
Laser rifles deliver reliable ranged damage and are iconic weapons for advanced factions.
[bold]Laser Rifle[/bold] — Standard-issue energy rifle. Accurate and effective at medium range.
[bold]Automatic Laser Rifle[/bold] — Full-auto variant. Burns through cells fast but puts out heavy sustained fire.
[bold]AER14 Prototype[/bold] — Experimental pre-war design with enhanced beam focus and damage output.
[bold]Wattz 3000[/bold] — Premium civilian laser rifle. Excellent accuracy and reliability.
## Gatling Laser
The Gatling Laser is a heavy beam weapon capable of sustained fire that can shred exposed targets very quickly.
[bold]Gatling Laser[/bold] — Rotary-barrel heavy energy weapon. The energy equivalent of a minigun.
## Improvised Energy Weapons
Makeshift and crude laser weapons can be built from salvaged parts, though they are usually less reliable than pre-war models.
[bold]Crude Laser Rifle[/bold] — Cobbled together from scrap optics and salvaged cells. Unreliable but functional.
[bold]Makeshift Laser Rifle[/bold] — Slightly better than crude. Uses jury-rigged focusing lenses.
